title: Intense Charred Scottish Pistachio Welsh Rarebit
description: A rich and savory Scottish twist on the classic Welsh rarebit, featuring charred flavors and crunchy pistachios to cure any hangover, high in protein for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Butter the toasted bread slices on both sides.
In a saucepan, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the grated cheese, milk, worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper to the saucepan and stir until the cheese is melted and the mixture is smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and set aside.
Add the chopped pistachios to the cheese mixture and stir to combine.
Temper the eggs by slowly pouring the warm cheese mixture into the bowl with the eggs, whisking constantly.
Pour the egg and cheese mixture over the toasted bread slices.
Place the bread slices under the broiler and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the top is charred and the mixture is molten.
